title: Cute Baby Eyes
description: Changes one-pixel eyes to two/three-pixel eyes on baby mobs from update 26.1.
body:
![CUTE BABY EYES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55930961f136d86c5920eae44f7da1d4ca5d3f3a.png)

## **😺 About 🐄**

This resource pack is a small but very noticeable visual tweak that makes baby mobs (changed in snapshot for 26.1) in Minecraft look cuter. If you’ve ever felt that the default one-pixel eyes look a bit empty or soulless on tiny animals, this pack is made for you.

The main change is straightforward: baby mob eyes are changed from 1 pixel to 2 or 3 pixels ones, keeping their original (from older versions) shape and vanilla style intact. 

## **🐑 Affected mobs 🐖**
- Cow
- Sheep
- Pig
- Cat
- Ocelot
- Mooshroom (Cow)
- Wolf

_Baby Nautilus, Chicken and Rabbit are not changed (may change later)._

## **☕ Useful info 🐈**

**🦴 How to install 🤔**

For Modrinth web users:
- Click "Versions".
- Click the download button next to version you want.
- After you download Cute_Baby_Eyes.zip go to %appdata%
- Copy .zip to <user>/roaming/.minecraft/resourcepacks

For Modrinth app users:
- Click "Versions".
- Click the download button next to version you want.

**💫 Vanilla+ ✨**

The pack sticks closely to Mojang’s original color palette and avoids adding new styles. This is pure Vanilla+.

### **📖 Compatibility ⚙️**
**Optifine is NOT required (as well as EMF and ETF)**

Version warnings can be safely ignored if you’re on a supported version - with each update that changes baby mobs - come back for a newer version. 🙃
